introSection: Zingo was a wooden roller coaster located at Bell's Amusement Park in Tulsa, Oklahoma, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Zingo opened in 1968.

The last season of operation was 2006 as the local authority terminated the park's lease in November. Demolition of Zingo began in 2007.

fullText:
Zingo was a wooden roller coaster located at Bell's Amusement Park in Tulsa, Oklahoma, USA.

Zingo opened in 1968.

The last season of operation was 2006 as the local authority terminated the park's lease in November. Demolition of Zingo began in 2007.
